title: Fix white void after bookmark jump in PDF viewer (dbg105)
description:
Bookmark Go at unchanged zoom left a large white area on the right side of the sheet until Ctrl+wheel zoom forced a full re-render.

Cause: dbg104 bookmark repaint forced tile invalidation and temporarily set canvas display size to the cropped slot size (dispW×dispH) instead of the full PDF crop layout (natW×fitScale with negative margins). dbg105 keeps canvas geometry intact on scroll-only bookmark jumps and applies cached tiles synchronously when available.

Who is affected: OVH private server PDF Viewer fullscreen.
changeLog: Stop corrupting canvas layout when invalidating PDF tiles.
Bookmark Go scroll-only: repaint visible tiles without force-wipe.
Sync tile-cache apply on bookmark for instant sharp paint when cached.
